goal: Fix #84: surface staleReason and advisory on coverage array entries

summary.title: Surface staleReason and advisory on coverage array entries
summary.what: Add staleReason ('none' | 'source_content_changed' | 'source_set_changed') and advisory boolean to CoverageInventoryStatus. Compute them in toCoverageInventoryStatus using the same logic as requestedCoverageStaleReason, plus isAdvisorySourceContentStale for the advisory flag. Add 3 RED-then-GREEN tests covering fresh, content-changed, and file-set-changed scenarios.
summary.why: Coverage array entries only had freshness: 'fresh' | 'stale' with no staleReason. 6/6 dogfood agents reported coverage warnings as noise because they couldn't distinguish advisory stale (content changed, query still safe) from real stale (file set changed, needs sync). Real data showed 51/53 codex coverage entries stale, but only 1 was advisory and 50 were real — agents had no way to tell without the staleReason field.
summary.user_goal: Fix #84: surface staleReason and advisory on coverage array entries

decisions.point: Where to compute staleReason for array entries
decisions.chose: Inline in toCoverageInventoryStatus, reusing the fileSetFingerprint comparison logic from requestedCoverageStaleReason
decisions.rationale: The logic is simple enough to inline (3 lines) and avoids extracting a shared function that would be over-engineering for now. The existing requestedCoverageStaleReason covers 'missing' which doesn't apply to array entries (they exist by definition).
rejected: Extract a shared staleReasonForRecord helper used by both toCoverageInventoryStatus and requestedCoverageStaleReason — rejected because the 'missing' case only applies to requestedCoverage, making the shared function awkward

decisions.point: Whether to add advisory field or just staleReason
decisions.rationale: staleReason gives the raw reason; advisory gives the actionable conclusion (should I sync or not). Agents reading JSON can check advisory directly without re-implementing the isAdvisorySourceContentStale logic (which is codex-specific today).
rejected: Only add staleReason and let consumers compute advisory — rejected because isAdvisorySourceContentStale is a source-specific policy that consumers shouldn't need to duplicate

architectural_claims: CoverageInventoryStatus now carries staleReason and advisory alongside freshness, mirroring RequestedCoverageStatus
behavioral_changes: shlog status --json now includes staleReason and advisory fields on each coverage array entry
